name: Cloud Audit Log Tampering Detection
description: Detects tampering with cloud audit logs such as CloudTrail being stopped, log deletion, or S3 log bucket policy changes. Riggs AI assesses the tampering severity and blast radius. Confirmed tampering triggers immediate forensic preservation of remaining logs, re-enablement of logging, security lead approval for incident escalation, incident ticket creation, and emergency team notification.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of CloudTrail tampering findings and API to re-enable audit logging

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create critical incident tickets for audit log tampering events

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Emergency notification to security team of audit log tampering

config.description: Triggers when CloudTrail or equivalent audit logging is stopped, deleted, or when log bucket policies are modified

config.additional_instructions: Assess audit log tampering: determine who stopped logging, what time window of logs may be missing, and whether this correlates with other suspicious activity
config.description: AI-powered assessment of audit log tampering to determine severity, blast radius, and whether it correlates with an active attack
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed malicious audit log tampering versus an operational change

config.query: Copy remaining CloudTrail logs from trail={{trigger_1.alert.trail_name}} to forensic-preservation bucket, lock with S3 Object Lock, record last available log timestamp
config.description: Immediately preserve all remaining audit logs before any further tampering can occur by copying to a forensic bucket with immutable object lock

parameters.reason: Re-enabling CloudTrail after confirmed tampering — AI assessment: {{analyze_1.severity}}

config.description: Re-enable the audit trail to restore visibility into cloud API activity
Requires security lead approval to escalate to full incident response given the severity of audit log tampering

parameters.summary: AUDIT LOG TAMPERING: {{trigger_1.alert.trail_name}} — Immediate Investigation Required

config.description: Create a critical incident ticket documenting the audit log tampering and all preservation actions
Send emergency notification to the security team about the audit log tampering

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). CloudTrail change determined to be an authorized operational modification, not malicious tampering. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the audit log change was determined to be an authorized operational action
Cloud audit log tampering detection and response complete
